title: GSR No. 3506(E) dated 23.12.2015-Re-constitution of Committee comprising of members for the purpose of control and supervision of experiments on animals.

इसके बाद सिमित का फर पुनग$ठन कया गया तथा इसे भारत के राजप) असाधारण म6 दनांक 30.08.2012 क अिधसूचना संaया का.आ. 2041 (अ) के ारा कािशत कया गया था। MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT, FOREST AND CLIMATE CHANGE NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 23rd December, 2015 S.O. 3506(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 15 (1) of the Prevention of Cruelty to Animals Act, 1960 (59 of 1960), the Central Government, on the advice of the Board, and being satisfied that it is necessary for the purpose of controlling and supervising experiments on animals, hereby constitutes a Committee consisting of the following persons as its Members, with effect from the date of publication of this notification in the Official Gazette, namely:— 1 Special Secretary / Additional Secretary, Incharge of Animal Welfare, Government of India, Ministry of Environment, Forest & Climate Change, New Delhi Chairman 2 Joint Secretary (Animal Welfare), Ministry of Environment, Forest & Climate Change, New Delhi Vice Chairman 3. Dr. Akshay Chandra Dhariwal Director, National Vector Borne Diseases Control Programme, Ministry of Health & Family Welfare, Govt. of India, 22-Sham Nath Marg, Delhi – 110054 Member 4. Dr. Ashok Kale Parshuram Professor, Preventive & Social Medicine, Dr. Ulhas Patil Medical College, Jalgaon (Maharashtra), Purv Adhyaksha Arogya Bharti, Puna G11, Karan Society, Near Rosary School, Warje, Pune – 411058 Member 5. Dr. A.B. Pandey Head, Division of Virology cum Station Incharge, IVRI campus, Mukteswar (Kumaon), Distt Nainital, Uttarakhand - 263138 Member -- 4 of 6 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(ii)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 5 6. Dr. Sukh Mahendra Singh, School of Biotechnology, Banaras Hindu University, Faculty of Science, Varanasi – 221005, U.P. Member 7. Dr. R Balasubramanian Science Policy Advisor, Research and Toxiciology Department, Humane Society International, Hyderabad. Member 15. Representative from Wild Life Institute of India (WII), Dehradun. Member 16. Chairman, Animal Welfare Board of India (AWBI), No. 13/1, 3rd Seward Road, Valmiki Nagar, Thiruvanmiyur, Chennai – 600041. Member 17. Director, National Institute of Animal Welfare (NIAW), Ballabhgarh, Haryana. Member 18. Director/Deputy Secretary (Animal Welfare) Ministry of Environment, Forests & Climate Change, New Delhi. Member Secretary 2. The Central Government hereby nominates Special Secretary / Additional Secretary, incharge of Animal Welfare, Ministry of Environment, Forest & Climate Change to be the Chairman of the Committee as per sub-section (2) of Section 15 of the said Act. 3. Joint Secretary (Animal Welfare), Ministry of Environment, Forest & Climate Change will be Vice Chairman of the Committee. 4. The term of the Committee shall, unless sooner dissolved, be two years from the date of its constitution. -- 5 of 6 -- 6 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] 5. The Committee constituted earlier vide Gazette Notification no. S.O. 2041(E) dated 30.08.2012 stands dissolved from the date of publication of this notification in the Official Gazette. [F. No. 25/44/2015-CPCSEA] ANIL BAHUGUNA, Jt. Secy. Note: The earlier notification constituting the Committee for the Purpose of Control and Supervision of Experiments on Animals was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary vide No. S.O.32 (E) dated 10th January, 2003 and was subsequently amended vide Notification Numbers. S.O. 599(E) dated 26.05.2003, S.O.955(E) dated 21.08.2003, S.O.69(E) dated 15.01.2004, S.O.85(E) dated 25.01.2005, S.O.1491(E) dated 17.10.2005 and S.O.933(E) dated 21.06.2006. The Committee was again constituted and published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary vide No. S.O.1817(E) dated 19.10.2006 and amended vide notification numbers S.O.1328(E) dated 07.06.2010 and S.O.2778(E) dated 10.11.2010. The Committee was further re-constituted and published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary vide No. S.O.2041(E) dated 30.08.2012.
